about: CDR-0 conformance corpus — generated by `cargo run -p xtask -- gen-conformance`. Each fixture is a CBOR-encoded manifest a conforming reader must accept or reject per docs/spec/CDR-0.md §5.

cases.reason: algorithm tag does not match the canonical CDR_ALGO
chunks do not tile the file contiguously from offset 0
declared size != sum of chunk lengths
spec_version is newer than this reader implements
